name: harness-engineer
description: CodeBuddy Code CLI plugin for planning, autonomous runs, verification, recovery, and safe engineering workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Planning, autonomous runs, verification, recovery, and safety workflow plugin for CodeBuddy Code CLI.
interface.longDescription: Provides CodeBuddy-specific slash commands, skills, agents, hooks, safety checks, bounded autonomous execution, verification evidence, and recovery flow for software engineering tasks.
defaultPrompt: /harness-engineer:plan add tests for the flaky retry path
/harness-engineer:run add tests for the flaky retry path
